<a name="Config"></a>
## type [Config](<https://github.com/Ask-Atlas/AskAtlas/blob/main/api/internal/config/config.go#L10-L21>)

Config contains runtime configuration required by the API application.

```go
type Config struct {
    DatabaseURL             string
    ClerkWebhookSecret      string
    ClerkSecretKey          string
    QStashToken             string
    QStashCurrentSigningKey string
    QStashNextSigningKey    string
    AppBaseURL              string
    AppEnv                  string
    S3Bucket                string
    Port                    string
}
```

<a name="Load"></a>
### func [Load](<https://github.com/Ask-Atlas/AskAtlas/blob/main/api/internal/config/config.go#L24>)

```go
func Load() (Config, error)
```

Load reads and validates runtime configuration from environment variables.
